generation_rule: Generate the product of every root-coverage relation (none, proper, complete) with whether unforced extra material is present.
grammar_boundary: All representations classified solely by coverage of the admitted root occurrence and addition of material not supplied by that occurrence.

candidates.exact_form: Representation has none coverage of the admitted root occurrence and relation no-extra.
Representation has none coverage of the admitted root occurrence and relation has-extra.
Representation has proper coverage of the admitted root occurrence and relation no-extra.
Representation has proper coverage of the admitted root occurrence and relation has-extra.
Representation has complete coverage of the admitted root occurrence and relation no-extra.
Representation has complete coverage of the admitted root occurrence and relation has-extra.
